channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Supreme Court rolls back longstanding campaign finance restrictions
item.description: The Supreme Court ruled that the spending limits violate the First Amendment.

item.title: Supreme Court rejects Trump's attempt to end birthright citizenship
item.description: The Supreme Court on Tuesday rejected President Donald Trump's executive order to end birthright citizenship in the U.S.

item.title: Rescuers cling to hope for survivors 6 days after Venezuela earthquakes
item.description: NASA reports that the earthquakes in Venezuela six days ago may have damaged or destroyed 58,000 buildings, as rescuers race to find survivors.

item.title: The 2026 FIFA World Cup schedule and how to watch
item.description: With 104 World Cup games across the U.S., Canada and Mexico, it's like 'a Super Bowl every single day for five weeks,' says U.S. captain Tim ...
